data.name: LanguageSet
data.value: Language saved. Send a TikTok/YouTube Shorts/Instagram Reels link and I will draft a recipe.

data.name: SendLinkPrompt
data.value: Send a TikTok/YouTube Shorts/Instagram Reels link and I will draft a recipe for you.

data.name: InvalidLink
data.value: Please send a TikTok, YouTube Shorts, or Instagram Reels link.

data.name: RecipeSaved
data.value: Recipe saved! Use /categories to browse or /search <name> to find recipes.

data.name: CategoriesEmpty
data.value: No recipes yet. Send a video link to save one.

data.name: SearchHelp
data.value: Send /search <name> to find recipes by title.

data.name: SearchMissing
data.value: Please provide a search term after /search.
